creator: bg1tpt@gmail.com
text:
I have submitted a new patch to rrdtool 1.3.7, and covered this option.
http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=133798


On Tue, Mar 24, 2009 at 11:20 PM,  <pav@freebsd.org> wrote:
> Synopsis: databases/rrdtool update
>
> State-Changed-From-To: feedback->open
> State-Changed-By: pav
> State-Changed-When: Tue Mar 24 15:12:40 UTC 2009
> State-Changed-Why:
> maintainer timeout, submitter feedback timeout
>
> submitter: what do you want to do with this at this moment?
> commit this OPTIONS patch?
>
> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=130063
>
